_description: Fixture: bare-string directive merge_policy (ticket #245). The operator's live repos.json sets the hydra self-entry to the bare string "auto_if_review_clean" (a directive applied uniformly to T1/T2, T3 always 'never'). This fixture exercises each bare directive — auto, auto_if_review_clean, human — so the lookup recognizes them instead of erroring 'unknown legacy merge_policy'. See docs/specs/2026-06-07-merge-policy-auto-if-review-clean.md.
